screener_read.dashboard_summary: Strong bullish continuation winner driven by high tactical trend score, strong macro alignment, strong ADX fit, positive FVG/context, and very strong conviction.
screener_read.chart_agreement_note: MT5 D1/H4 structure supports the bullish continuation winner, but current price location is too close to local resistance for a clean market entry.

market_state.location_comment: Bullish trend intact, but current price is closer to nearby resistance than to the best pullback support.

why: Bullish trend and macro alignment are strong.
Current price is sitting too close to nearby resistance for a clean market chase.
A pullback entry offers materially better asymmetry than an immediate entry.

primary_plan.rr_comment: Blended package is about 2.1R with better asymmetry on the deeper leg.
primary_plan.trailing_plan_note: Disabled in the base executable package; reconsider ATR trailing only after a clean H4 breakout above 0.87480.

orderability.allowed_entry_logic: Rest buy limits at 0.87030 and 0.86860 with shared SL 0.86695 and shared TP 0.87470.

backup_plan.trigger_logic: Only if H4 closes above 0.87430 and then retest holds above 0.87360; breakout stop-entry above 0.87485.
backup_plan.note: This is secondary and not preferred while the market remains under the current resistance shelf.

risk_sizing.sizing_note: Kept below the margin cap; did not use full risk budget because margin is the tighter practical constraint for this package.

legs.trigger: resting order at first tactical support
resting order at deeper pullback support

trailing.note: Base executable package keeps trailing disabled; optional later manual conversion only after confirmed breakout.

final_verdict.what_would_invalidate_the_idea: Acceptance below 0.86695 or repeated H4 failure that hardens 0.8737-0.8748 as a lasting ceiling.
final_verdict.what_i_should_do_now: Do not buy market here; only place the dip ladder if you want exposure.

notes: Two-leg package uses one shared SL and one shared TP.
Trailing is intentionally disabled in the base executable package.
Total planned risk and margin remain inside pack limits.
